response.overview: Spirit.com is a suspense-driven coming-of-age thriller that follows a group of coaching students whose ordinary routine slowly unravels into something far darker. What begins as a normal academic life filled with friendships, pressure, and light-hearted moments takes a chilling turn when one of their close friends mysteriously disappears.  As the group starts searching for answers, they are pulled deeper into a web of hidden truths, psychological tension, and unexpected danger. Each clue leads them further away from reality and closer to something they were never meant to uncover.  Set against the raw, grounded environment of student life, the story blends humor, emotion, and suspense while exploring themes of loyalty, fear, and the consequences of curiosity. As secrets begin to surface, the line between trust and betrayal blurs—and not everyone makes it out unchanged.
response.tagline: Not every truth wants to be uncovered.
response.title: Spirit.com
